notes: Third-party ARC Prize verified scores. Effort labels Max/Extra High/High/Medium/Low mapped to max/xhigh/high/medium/low. ARC-AGI-3 remains near-floor for most systems; do not treat ARC-AGI-1 saturation as coding-agent ranking. Cost/task only recorded where leaderboard listed Sol variants in the crawl (low/medium/high).

claims.statement: ARC Prize: Sol at max is the standout of the GPT-5.6 family on ARC-AGI-3 (public/semi-private averages cited on results page); first model to win an ARC-AGI-3 public game (ft09, 87% at Max).
claims.implication: Effort stratification matters; ARC-AGI-3 discriminates where ARC-AGI-1 does not.
